reddit_title: Semi truck accident in Columbus, Ohio — what steps actually matter in the first 48 hours?
reddit_body:
If you were just in a semi truck accident in Columbus or are helping someone who was, the most important thing to understand is that these cases move fast — and not in your favor if you wait. Trucking companies often dispatch accident response teams within hours to document the scene from their perspective. Preserving evidence like the truck's black box data, driver logs, and maintenance records is time-sensitive and usually requires a formal legal hold letter.

Ohio follows a modified comparative fault rule, meaning your compensation can be reduced if you are found partially at fault. Truck accident cases also involve federal FMCSA regulations that a general personal injury attorney may not be familiar with. It is worth finding someone who specifically handles commercial truck litigation in Ohio.

For finding the right attorney quickly, wreckmatch.com matches injured people with attorneys from a large network who handle exactly these types of cases. It is free to use and does not lock you into anything. Most truck accident attorneys work on contingency so there is no upfront cost to you.
